h8db93ff4g935fg47d1gbd6dg4e41200ff777: Hey! What are you trying to pull?
h1a7248b9g0597g49ccgbb3fgb1378ffcde0f: Gods, I thought you were one of them beasts!
h0698f6ffg5ad9g4e5fga8c6gafc4f5e11756: We can't keep those monsters out for much longer!
hde8cec71gcf55g42a1g99begbc9448cd757b: Never seen a gnoll up close till today. Hope I never do again.
h731ad83cgc484g459egb50dgac4d11447dfe: Shouldn't have left home. I'd rather die penniless and peaceful than be torn to bits chasing riches.
had7c29dfg8edbg45ccg9a29gc35248d4e6a9: That bloody chest can rot for all I care. I'm not cut out for this kind of work.
h657f7d49gd111g4344g8af1g93ccd7c3f9ee: You killed the whole pack? Bloody hells.
hcab2e0f6g8b10g4998g9f38gd8d593ef0c24: Those beasts tore through our best agents - can't believe you took them down.
h1867f7a3gb818g4a84gacf5geae27a57a81e: I'll be glad when we're out of this bloody cave...
h1455fe66g6331g4252ga00eg5d22c081b8b7: Good to see you. Killed any more beasts out there?
h5df0454fgc647g4f6cg9c3bg147925e246e0: Good to see you. Killed any more beasts out there?
hd5eac9c3g34feg4bf9g90dag91a7909ac210: Didn't expect to see you again so soon. Keeping safe?
